summary.key_theme: 公司透過收購 Valve Research & Manufacturing 強化航太產品組合，並受惠於強勁的技術面動能與航太產業熱度。

bullish.title: Woodward Announces Deal to Acquire VRM to Boost Aerospace Portfolio
bullish.reason: 選擇此篇作為代表，因為它明確指出收購 Florida-based Valve Research & Manufacturing (VRM) 將增加精密流量控制閥技術，直接擴大 Woodward 在航太領域的產品組合與競爭優勢。

bullish.title: Woodward (WWD): 3 Reasons We Love This Stock
bullish.reason: 報導指出 Woodward 股價在過去六個月內飆升 60.8%，顯示出強勁的市場動能與投資人信心。

bullish.title: Woodward Inc. (NASDAQ:WWD) Shows Strong Technical and Fundamental Momentum in Minervini-Style Analysis
bullish.reason: 透過 Minervini 風格分析，確認該股具備高成長動能與強勁的技術面趨勢，有利於吸引動能型投資人。

bullish.title: Woodward Stock Is One Worth Watching As Aerospace Remains A Hot Group
bullish.reason: 強調航太產業整體熱度，作為該產業的領先企業，Woodward 受到市場高度關注。

bearish.title: Genco, Primoris, Woodward, Regal Rexnord, and VSE Corporation Shares Plummet, What You Need To Know
bearish.reason: 受地緣政治緊張局勢影響，導致大盤下跌，Woodward 股價隨之出現修正，反映出宏觀風險對個股的短期衝擊。

bearish.title: Woodward Insider Sale And Board Support Contrast With Valuation Concerns
bearish.reason: 內部人賣股行為引發市場對公司當前估值是否過高的擔憂，儘管董事會仍給予支持，但估值壓力仍是潛在風險。
